name: com.blazesportsintel/college-baseball
description: Live scores, standings, rankings, schedules, and advanced sabermetric analytics (wOBA, wRC+, FIP, ERA-, BABIP, ISO) for all 330 NCAA Division I college baseball teams. Data sourced from Highlightly, ESPN, and BSI Savant (6-hour compute cron). Responses include a meta block with source attribution and fetch timestamp.
